title: Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 8
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|title=''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 8}} {{ComicBook |reprint=1 |image=[[File:CSWTEA8-LEC.png]] |title=''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 8 |writer=[[Russ Manning]] |penciller=Russ Manning |inker= |letterer= |colorist=[[Ray Murtaugh]] |cover artist=[[Kilian Plunkett]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[March 14]], [[1995]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53787/classic_star_wars_the_early_adventures_1994_8|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (1994) #8}} |pages=25 |upc= |timeline=[[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] |series=''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]'' |issue=8 }} '''''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 8''' is the eighth issue of the ''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]'' series, published by [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]]. This particular ''Classic'' series were reformatted and colored reprints of the ''Star Wars'' [[Star Wars (comic strip)|daily newspaper strip]] by [[Russ Manning]] from the early 1980s. ==Publisher's summary== ''Crucial components of the Rebel Alliance's X-wing fighters have been compromised by a neutral planet's desire for profits. Some people in Tun Wala would sell the units to the Empire as soon as they'd sell them to the Rebellion! Now Darth Vader is on his way to the planet to destroy the Rebels, and, neutral or not, the planet itself!'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures Book 8
AS LONG AS WE LIVE |text=A Rebel detachment has arrived on the neutral planet of Arda-2 to negotiate for targeting equipment, but somebody on Arda-2 would just as soon deal with the Empire, and Darth Vader is prepared to destroy the entire world to get the Rebels, neutral planet or not...}} ==Contents== *"[[As Long As We Live...]]" ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 8}} ===Cover gallery=== File:TheEarlyAdventures8.jpg|Dark Horse cover File:CSWTEA8-LEC.png|Legends Epic Collection cover ===Collected in=== *[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (trade paperback)|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' trade paperback]] *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Newspaper Strips Vol. 1]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends: The Newspaper Strips Omnibus]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53787/classic_star_wars_the_early_adventures_1994_8|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (1994) #8}} {{Interlang |ka=კლასიკური ვარსკვლავური ომები: ადრეული თავგადასავლები 8 }} [[Category:Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures issues|08|Early Adventures 08]]
